executives.name: Troy Boisjoli
executives.background: Mr. Boisjoli has over 15 years of experience in the uranium industry. He previously served as Vice President, Operations and Project Development for NexGen Energy Ltd., where he led the development of the Rook I Project. He also held various roles at Cameco Corporation, including positions at the McArthur River and Key Lake operations.

executives.name: Mike Castanho
executives.background: Mr. Castanho is a co-founder of Atha Energy and has over 20 years of experience in the capital markets and resource sector. He has been involved in the founding and financing of several successful resource companies.

executives.name: Akash Patel
executives.background: Mr. Patel has over 10 years of experience in corporate finance and accounting. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies in the resource and technology sectors.

executives.name: Cliff Revering
executives.background: Mr. Revering is a Professional Geoscientist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on uranium exploration and development. He previously held senior roles at Cameco Corporation and SRK Consulting.

board_of_directors.name: Troy Boisjoli
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Boisjoli has over 15 years of experience in the uranium industry. He previously served as Vice President, Operations and Project Development for NexGen Energy Ltd., where he led the development of the Rook I Project.

board_of_directors.name: Mike Castanho
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Castanho is a co-founder of Atha Energy and has over 20 years of experience in the capital markets and resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Doug Adams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adams has over 25 years of experience in the investment industry, specializing in the resource sector. He has held senior positions at several Canadian investment dealers.

board_of_directors.name: Sean Harquail
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harquail has over 15 years of experience in the mining and finance industries. He is currently a Managing Director at a private investment firm and has served on the boards of several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffery Scott
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Scott has over 30 years of experience in the energy and resource sectors. He has served as a director and officer of numerous public and private companies.

sources.source_description: Atha Energy Corp. Official Website - Management and Board Profiles
